creator: sql82@list.ru
text:
Experience with FreeBSD 6.1-RELEASE amd64 on ASUS A8V-MX:

ACPI 2.0 is enabled BIOS
APIC APIC Support is enabled in BIOS
SATA II  WDC WD2500JS-55MHB gets recognized as SATA-150. Serial ATA IDE Controller mode in BIOS set in "SATA" (RAID and AHCI also avaliable)
Onboard sound and network adapter works fine
